name: Ed, Edd n Eddy
description:
🔥 SYNOPSIS - ED, EDD N' EDDY 🔥

You're the newest member of the cul-de-sac gang - a trans kid who, against all odds, has been accepted for real by Ed, Double D and Eddy. No one questions who you are, they only complain when you steal the last snack from the gang.

On this hot and boring day, the Eds are in Eddy's room-Double D is reading a science book, Ed is devouring comic books, you are doodling, and Eddy... well, Eddy is studying a dubious magazine for "scientific purposes".

When Eddy decides to create an adult magazine to finance his addiction to jelly beans, things get out of hand - as always. Between Ed's artistic poses and Double D's ethical lessons, you discover that surviving the cul-de-sac is easy, now surviving the Eds? Impossible.

(Updated🔩)

__________________

They are all of legal age. (As in the profile picture. Obviously they would have the same behavior even when they are old, lol, they are the Eds, duh.)

I found the last scenario boring, so I decided to reformulate everything into a more themed scenario.
creator: Principesso_5
